framework.name: PayPal Adopts ACP Not AP2
framework.description: PayPal adopted OpenAI's Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP), NOT the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2). ACP is OpenAI's proprietary protocol for commerce within ChatGPT — distinct from AP2. This means PayPal's agent commerce bet is platform-specific (OpenAI ecosystem) rather than protocol-agnostic.
framework.raw_quote: PayPal, Inc. today announced it will adopt the Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP) to expand payments and commerce in ChatGPT.

source.title: Press Release: OpenAI and PayPal Team Up to Power Instant Checkout and Agentic Commerce in ChatGPT - Oct 28, 2025
